headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Monday.
summary: Curious about the top performers within the S&P500 index in the middle of the day on Monday? Dive into the list of today's session's top gainers and losers for a comprehensive overview.

headline: AKAM Partners With DCT to Accelerate Cloud Modernization for Enterprises
summary: Akamai partners with Digital Convergence Technologies in Partner Connect to streamline cloud modernization and help enterprises migrate workloads to its cloud.
